title: Pre-Release v0.7.1 QA — E2E Scenario Tests

stories.title: Build + Unit Tests
acceptanceCriteria: pnpm build completes with 0 tsc errors
pnpm test passes all existing unit tests (941+)

stories.title: CLI 커맨드 출력 검증 — Market Data
acceptanceCriteria: perp market list -e hyperliquid outputs market list without error
perp market list -e pacifica outputs market list without error
perp market list -e lighter outputs market list without error
perp market price ETH -e hyperliquid returns valid price
perp market price ETH -e pacifica returns valid price
perp market price ETH -e lighter returns valid price
perp market funding -e hyperliquid returns funding rates
perp market funding -e lighter returns funding rates
--json flag produces valid JSON output for market commands

stories.title: CLI 커맨드 출력 검증 — Account & Portfolio
acceptanceCriteria: perp account -e hyperliquid shows balance without error
perp account -e pacifica shows balance without error
perp account -e lighter shows balance without error
perp positions -e hyperliquid returns position list (may be empty)
perp orders -e hyperliquid returns open orders (may be empty)
perp arb scan runs and outputs results without error

stories.title: Perp 주문/취소 E2E — Hyperliquid
acceptanceCriteria: 10-15 representative HL perp assets: limit order at 50% below market → order confirmed → cancel → cancel confirmed
Assets tested include: BTC, ETH, SOL, AVAX, DOGE, LINK, ARB, OP, SUI, APT
All orders respect MIN_NOTIONAL ($12+)
All decimal/precision from API (no hardcoded fallback)
Zero errors across all order/cancel cycles

stories.title: Perp 주문/취소 E2E — Pacifica
acceptanceCriteria: 10-15 representative PAC perp assets: limit order at 50% below market → order confirmed → cancel → cancel confirmed
Assets tested include: BTC, ETH, SOL, AVAX, DOGE, LINK, SUI, APT, SEI
All orders respect MIN_NOTIONAL ($12+)
Zero errors across all order/cancel cycles

stories.title: Perp 주문/취소 E2E — Lighter
acceptanceCriteria: 10-15 representative LT perp assets: limit order at 50% below market → order confirmed → cancel → cancel confirmed
Assets tested include: BTC, ETH, SOL, LINK, AVAX, AAVE, UNI, LDO, ARB, OP
All orders respect MIN_NOTIONAL ($12+)
All decimal/precision from API (no hardcoded fallback)
Zero errors across all order/cancel cycles

stories.title: Spot 주문/취소 E2E — HL + LT
acceptanceCriteria: HL spot: 5+ assets (ETH, HYPE, PURR, UBTC, UETH) — limit order → cancel → confirmed
LT spot: 5+ assets (ETH, LINK, AAVE, UNI, LDO) — limit order → cancel → confirmed
Spot decimal auto-rounding works correctly
Zero errors across all spot order/cancel cycles

stories.title: 결과값 비교 + 최종 검증
acceptanceCriteria: Account balance from CLI matches expected range (no gross discrepancies)
Price data within ±5% of real-time market prices
All QA-01 through QA-07 stories passed
QA results documented in progress.txt
